name: California Coast Credit Union - Hillcrest Branch
description_short: California Coast Credit Union's Hillcrest branch is a full-service credit union location in San Diego offering checking, savings, loans, and ATM services to members in Southern California counties.
description_long: California Coast Credit Union operates as a member-owned financial cooperative serving San Diego, Riverside, Orange, Los Angeles, Ventura, Imperial, and San Bernardino counties. The Hillcrest branch, located at 1060 University Ave in the HUB Center alongside Trader Joe's and Ralphs, represents one of the credit union's physical service locations designed for in-person member interaction and account management. The branch features distinctive art-nouveau architecture with an Alphonse Mucha-inspired mural on its facade, creating a notable community landmark in the University and Vermont corner location. As a credit union rather than a traditional bank, California Coast operates on a cooperative model where members are partial owners, theoretically allowing for member-focused decision-making and service priorities. The Hillcrest location functions as a full-service branch capable of handling new account openings, loan applications, and member services during extended business hours including Saturday availability. The credit union emphasizes accessibility and community engagement, with wheelchair accessibility, 24-hour ATM services, and messaging contact options available to members. California Coast Credit Union holds NMLS ID# 407951 and uses ABA/Routing Number 322281578, confirming legitimate regulatory standing as a federally-chartered financial institution. The Hillcrest branch represents the credit union's commitment to maintaining physical presence and personal service in an increasingly digital banking landscape, offering members the hybrid option of in-person and digital banking services.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Full-service branch offering account opening, auto loans, credit cards, mortgages, home loans, and business accounts in-person
Extended branch hours including Saturday 9am-2pm and Friday until 6pm for working professionals
Fee-free ATM withdrawals and 24-hour walk-up ATM with cash and check deposit capabilities
Free cashier's checks (one per day) with valid government-issued ID
Wheelchair accessible location with accessibility optimization on website (AudioEye enabled)
Serves seven Southern California counties (San Diego, Riverside, Orange, Los Angeles, Ventura, Imperial, San Bernardino)
Member-owned cooperative structure emphasizing member benefits over shareholder profits
cons: Limited geographic footprint compared to major national banks; membership restricted to specific California county residents
Website content indicates Hillcrest is described as 'Escondido Branch' in page title despite being located in San Diego, suggesting potential branding or documentation inconsistency
Phone line for specific loan/account information (877-495-1600) suggests complex account inquiries may require staff time rather than self-service digital resolution
No mention of online-exclusive product offerings or digital banking advantages; appears to rely on traditional branch model
Limited transparency on loan rates and terms directly on the branch page; customers must navigate to separate rates section or contact branch
best_for: San Diego County residents and workers seeking convenient in-person banking with Saturday branch hours
Small business owners needing business checking, savings, and business loan services with personal relationship banking
Credit union members prioritizing cooperative ownership model and member-focused service over traditional bank structures
Consumers requiring accessible banking locations with wheelchair accommodation and ATM services in the Hillcrest neighborhood
diagnosis: The Hillcrest branch is best for existing or prospective credit union members in San Diego County seeking in-person banking services, loan applications, and account management with extended hours and accessibility accommodations. The main caveat is that membership eligibility is geographically restricted to residents or workers in seven specific Southern California counties, and this location appears optimized for traditional branch banking rather than digital-first consumers.
services: 24-hour ATM services with cash and check deposit
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 1060 University Ave A101, San Diego, CA 92103
